"I just might marry that --- today, But then I found out that Mickey was gay..." Inspired by Hey, Mickey by Baby Tate. I have 3 unfinished bots in my drafts that I made before this one. Guys this is my first time writing something NSFW please be kind sobs. This art makes me go insane.

ART IS NOT MINE!! I couldn't find the artist, however if you know who it is, do let me know :))

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
